creator: schweikh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I've got exactly that card working, it reports as 
schweikh@hal9000:~ $ dmesg|grep xl0 
xl0: <3Com 3c900-COMBO Etherlink XL> port 0xd400-0xd43f irq 5 at device 14.0 on pci0 
xl0: Ethernet address: 00:60:97:e3:d7:5d 
xl0: selecting 10baseT transceiver, half duplex 

So this appears to be fixed for quite some time now.
